acceptedAnswer.text: Whitepapper is a markdown-first content platform for developers to write once, distribute across channels, and reuse content via API.

mainEntity.name: How does Whitepapper improve SEO and GEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Whitepapper ships with metadata defaults, canonical controls, structured data, and sitemap support so published pages stay search and AI-discovery ready.
